samples.raw: We need to output JSON on a single line, with fields: "titlu","fapt","ce_inseamna","categorie". Must be valid JSON, no extra text. Must follow language rules: Romanian correct, no foreign words, prope

We need to output JSON on one line, valid JSON. Must include fields: "titlu","fapt","ce_inseamna","categorie". Title must be clear Romanian reformulated. Fact: 1-2 neutral sentences with main fact. ce
